member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Authentication.FirebaseAuthenticationOptions.ProjectIdPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{4,28}[a-z0-9]$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [a-z].
○ Match a character in the set [\-0-9a-z] greedily at least 4 and at most 28 times.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9a-z].
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.DashboardController
member.summary: Exposes real-time operations, membership, and financial analytics for GymTrackPro.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.DashboardController.GetMetrics
member.summary: Retrieves current key metrics, including active attendees, memberships, revenue figures, and plan performance.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the dashboard metrics.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.MembersController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for managing gym member profiles.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.MembersController.GetAll
member.summary: Retrieves all active and registered member profiles.
member.returns: A standardized API response listing the members.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.MembersController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific member profile by their primary identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the member.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the member's profile.
member.response: If the member is found.
If the member does not exist.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.MembersController.GetByQRCode(GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.QrCodeLookupRequestDto)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific member profile by their unique QR check-in code.
member.param: Body containing the QR code assigned to the member.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the member's profile.
member.response: If the member is found.
If no member matches the QR code.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.MembersController.Create(GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.CreateMemberDto)
member.summary: Registers and registers a new gym member.
member.param: The profile creation parameters.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the newly registered member profile.
member.response: If the member was successfully created.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.MembersController.Update(System.Int32,GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.UpdateMemberDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing member profile's contact and registration information.
member.param: The unique identifier of the member to update.
The updated profile parameters.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the updated member profile.
member.response: If the member was updated successfully.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.MembersController.Search(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Searches and filters member profiles with pagination support.
member.param: The search term matching name, phone, member ID, or QR code.
The member status filter.
The page number (1-indexed).
The page size.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the paginated search results.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.MembersController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Soft deletes an existing member profile.
member.param: The unique identifier of the member to delete.
member.returns: A standardized API response indicating successful deletion.
member.response: If the member was soft-deleted successfully.
If the member does not exist.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.NotificationsController.GetNotifications(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Retrieve list of notifications. Optionally filter by member ID.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.NotificationsController.MarkAsRead(System.Int32)
member.summary: Mark a notification as read.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PaymentsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for processing, searching, and refunding member payments.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific payment record by its unique identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the payment.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the payment details.
member.response: If the payment record is found.
If the payment record does not exist.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetByMemberId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all payment records linked to a specific member.
member.param: The unique identifier of the member.
member.returns: A standardized API response listing the member's transactions.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.Create(GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.CreatePaymentDto)
member.summary: Processes a new payment for a subscription.
member.param: The transaction parameters.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the processed payment receipt details.
member.response: If the payment is processed successfully.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.Refund(System.Int32)
member.summary: Refunds an existing completed payment transaction. Restricted to Administrators.
member.param: The unique identifier of the payment to refund.
member.returns: A standardized API response confirming the refund.
member.response: If the refund was processed successfully.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PaymentsController.Search(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Searches and filters gym payment transactions.
member.param: Filter by transaction date.
Filter by payment method (e.g. Cash, GCash, Maya, Card, BankTransfer).
Filter by payment status (e.g. Pending, Paid, Failed, Cancelled, Refunded).
Filter by specific member identifier.
Filter by partial/exact receipt number matching.
member.returns: A list of matching payment records.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PlansController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for managing gym membership plans.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PlansController.GetAll
member.summary: Retrieves all registered membership plans.
member.returns: A standardized API response listing available plans.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PlansController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves details of a specific membership plan by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the membership plan.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the plan details.
member.response: If the plan is found.
If the plan does not exist.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PlansController.Create(GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.CreateMembershipPlanDto)
member.summary: Creates a new membership plan. Restricted to Administrators.
member.param: The parameters defining the new plan.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the created plan details.
member.response: If the plan was created successfully.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PlansController.Update(System.Int32,GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.CreateMembershipPlanDto)
member.summary: Updates details of an existing membership plan. Restricted to Administrators.
member.param: The unique identifier of the plan to update.
The updated plan specifications.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the updated plan details.
member.response: If the plan was successfully updated.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.PlansController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a membership plan. Restricted to Administrators.
member.param: The unique identifier of the plan to delete.
member.returns: A standardized API response confirming the deletion.
member.response: If the plan was successfully deleted.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.ReportsController
member.summary: Exposes operations and financial reports for GymTrackPro.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SettingsController
member.summary: Exposes administrative endpoints to manage system-wide settings.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SettingsController.GetAllSettings
member.summary: Retrieves all current system settings.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SettingsController.UpdateSetting(System.String,GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.UpdateSettingDto)
member.summary: Updates a system configuration setting value. Restricted to Administrator role.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for managing member subscriptions and pauses.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific subscription record by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the subscription.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the subscription details.
member.response: If the subscription is found.
If the subscription record does not exist.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.GetByMemberId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all subscriptions linked to a specific member.
member.param: The unique identifier of the member.
member.returns: A standardized API response listing the member's subscriptions.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.Subscribe(GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.CreateSubscriptionDto)
member.summary: Enrolls a member in a new subscription plan.
member.param: The parameters specifying the member and the plan.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the newly created subscription details.
member.response: If the subscription is successfully registered.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.Pause(System.Int32,GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.PauseSubscriptionDto)
member.summary: Temporarily pauses an active member subscription.
member.param: The unique identifier of the subscription to pause.
The data transfer object containing the reason for pausing.
member.returns: A standardized API response confirming the pause operation.
member.response: If the subscription was successfully paused.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.Resume(System.Int32)
member.summary: Resumes a previously paused subscription.
member.param: The unique identifier of the subscription to resume.
member.returns: A standardized API response confirming the resume operation.
member.response: If the subscription was successfully resumed.

member.name: M:GymTrackPro.API.Controllers.SubscriptionsController.Renew(GymTrackPro.Shared.DTOs.RenewSubscriptionDto)
member.summary: Renews an active or expired subscription with a payment atomically inside a transaction.
member.param: The subscription details and payment inputs.
member.returns: A standardized API response containing the new subscription details.
member.response: If the renewal was successful.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Maintenance.SqlServerPreflightReadOnlyDataSource
member.summary: Executes an allow-listed catalog of SELECT-only SQL. It intentionally does not expose GymDbContext.SaveChanges or arbitrary SQL to the preflight runner.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Maintenance.ValidatedSqlServerConnection
member.summary: Carries a connection string only after it has passed the shared SQL Server transport and endpoint policy. Its string representation is intentionally redacted so routine diagnostics cannot disclose credentials or topology.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Maintenance.SqlServerConnectionPolicy
member.summary: Fail-closed connection policy shared by SQL Server maintenance executables. This validates configuration only; it never opens a database connection.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Migrations.AddAttendanceVoidingAndSource
member.summary: Adds the capstone attendance correction model while preserving the original datetime2 attendance value for existing rows.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Security.PreAuthenticationIpLimiter
member.summary: A fixed-capacity, per-IP admission limiter that runs before bearer-token processing. Entries are discarded at the window boundary, so attacker-controlled addresses cannot create an unbounded in-process partition dictionary.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Services.GymMembershipPolicy
member.summary: Canonical membership calendar and status policy. Subscription StartDate/EndDate are inclusive gym-calendar dates stored as midnight DateTimeKind.Unspecified.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Services.MemberDeletionTransaction
member.summary: Commits member soft deletion, linked gym-goer revocation, and its audit as one serializable operation. Back-office identities are never deactivated here.

member.name: T:GymTrackPro.API.Services.ProjectionVersionProvider
member.summary: Uses the request-scoped DbContext so a projection version can participate in the exact same transaction as its domain mutation.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
member.returns: The normalized documentation comment ID.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the ProjectIdPattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProjectIdPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiLettersLowerAndDigits
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
